summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Auto Business Platform (BIBI Cars) Vehicles module. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. The critical bug fix for POST /api/vehicles/:id/create-lead endpoint is confirmed working. Frontend loads correctly but has session management issues during modal interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Session expires during vehicle modal interaction, redirecting user to login page

integration_issues.issue: Vehicle cards click may not properly open modal due to session timeout

passed_tests: GET /api/vehicles - vehicle list with pagination and filters
Lead creation from vehicle works correctly
Vehicle statistics display (3 total, 2 Copart, 1 IAAI)
Vehicle cards display with images and prices
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management issue - users are being redirected to login page during vehicle modal interactions. This prevents proper testing of the create lead form functionality. Consider implementing session refresh or extending session timeout for better user experience.
